# _campaigns/ plane — gitignore rules
# Generated by campaigns-provision-helper.sh
#
# intel/ is pre-launch competitive data — never committed (high sensitivity).
# active/ is in-progress work — may contain draft creative (gitignored by default).
# launched/ is versioned: post-launch directory moves are committed so audit
#   trail shows when a campaign went live.
# lib/ is versioned: brand assets + swipe files are stable, reusable references.
# index/ contains generated artifacts — ignored by default.
# _config/ is versioned — plane configuration belongs in git.
#
# To version active campaign directories, remove active/ from this file.
# To version intel/, remove intel/ from this file (not recommended for
# competitive-sensitivity content).

active/
intel/
index/
